about.heading: About Morpheus Medical Aesthetics
body: Founded in 2009 by Dr. Marisha Chilcott, a board-certified family physician, Morpheus Medical Aesthetics is a woman-owned and operated med spa serving Santa Rosa and Marin. Dr. Chilcott discovered her passion for medical aesthetics while practicing medicine and considers herself an artist with the human face as her medium.

Clients are cared for by deeply experienced, highly trained providers who lead with integrity, artistry, and genuine warmth. From preventative care in your 20s to rejuvenating solutions at 50 and beyond, the team offers personalized treatments designed to help you feel confident, seen, and effortlessly radiant.

services.title: BOTOX & Dermal Fillers
services.description: Smooth expression lines and restore facial volume with expertly placed neuromodulators and fillers for natural, youthful results.

services.title: Laser Skin Resurfacing
services.description: Treat texture, tone, and sun damage with advanced devices like CO₂RE, Clear + Brilliant, and IPL.

services.title: Microneedling & PDO Threads
services.description: Stimulate collagen and gently lift the skin for firmer, smoother, more refreshed results.

services.title: HydraFacial & Chemical Peels
services.description: Deeply cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate for an immediate, healthy glow.

services.title: Hair Restoration
services.description: Non-surgical treatments to support thicker, fuller hair regrowth.

services.title: Wellness & Weight Loss
services.description: IV therapy, hormone replacement, and medically supervised semaglutide weight-loss programs.

sections.quote: I recently had the most incredible experience at Morpheus Medical Spa in Santa Rosa, and I cannot stop raving about it! From the moment I walked in, I was greeted by the friendly and knowledgeable staff who made me feel right at home.
